item.name: Brocade Carp
item.description:
Beautifully patterned and vibrantly hued, this freshwater fish has long been farmed in the One River for ornamental purposes.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Since olden days, this carp has been prized as an ornamental fish in the Far East. Although breeders exist who specialize in the species, many exceptionally beautiful specimens can be found even in the wilds of the One River.
